description_long: This object is a book lying open on a surface, with its pages spread and slightly crumpled, suggesting it has been handled or left open for reading. The pages are covered in printed text, and there is a soft, pink, fabric-like item resting on top of the open book, possibly a piece of clothing or a handkerchief. The book's paper appears to be white or off-white, and the text is in black ink, though some areas are blurred or obscured. The edges of the book and pages are irregular, with some visible tears or folds, giving it a worn, used appearance. The background includes hints of other objects, but the focus remains on the book and the pink item atop it. No distinct cover illustration or title text is visible from any angle.
description: An open, worn book with white pages and black printed text, topped by a soft pink fabric item. The book's pages are crumpled and irregular, suggesting frequent use.
description_view_0: The book is seen from above, showing the open pages, black text, and a pink fabric item resting at the center.
description_view_1: A side view highlights the thinness of the book and the raised pink fabric, with the crumpled pages visible along the edge.
description_view_2: A rear angled view shows the open book's spread and the pink item, with more of the background visible and the irregular page edges apparent.
description_view_3: Another side view, focusing on the pink fabric and the book's open, uneven pages, with some background elements in view.
